title: CrabTrap: An LLM-as-a-judge HTTP proxy to secure agents in production

excerpt: CrabTrap is an LLM-as-a-judge HTTP proxy to secure agents in production. It intercepts and audits AI agent requests in real time. Try it on GitHub now.
